title: Orison GraphQL Import Report v1
description: Stable envelope returned by `ori schema import graphql` describing a GraphQL SDL → Orison module import. Counts mirror the structural categories produced by `parse_sdl` and `to_orison_module` in the compiler.

module.description: Fully qualified Orison module name that the generated source will live in (e.g. `app.clients.github`).

types.description: Number of GraphQL object types lifted into Orison record declarations.

queries.description: Number of `type Query { ... }` fields turned into Orison `fn` declarations.

mutations.description: Number of `type Mutation { ... }` fields turned into Orison `fn` declarations.

generated_lines.description: Line count of the emitted Orison source (a trailing newline does not count as an extra line).

unsupported.description: GraphQL declarations recognised by the parser but not yet modelled by the bootstrap importer (e.g. `enum Role`, `interface Node`, `union Result`).
